<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Namecheap](https://www.namecheap.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/namecheap/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "namecheap"
  dnsCredentials:
    # NAMECHEAP_API_KEY: API key
    apiKey: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_API_USER: API user
    apiUser: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 60)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 15)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 3600)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_SANDBOX: Activate the sandbox (boolean)
    sandbox: ""
    # NAMECHEAP_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
